notes: Just edit, under the game's directory, Data/VideoSettings.scr and change 1024, 768 to 1920, 1080 or whatever resolution you want. It will be stretched but it will work.

notes: running perfectly, the first time I played was using POL. now with proton it gets easier. until then, the only problem I noticed, is the video of beginning, where the events are narrated. Other than that, the game is completely playable.
title: Sniper Art of Victory

notes: Game works out of the box on Proton with WineD3D (DX8). I copied manually dgVoodoo2, run protontricks GAMEID winecfg, set d3d8 to native and then the game worked on Vulkan with DXVK even when testing it with the new ACO compiler .
title: Sniper Art of Victory

notes: Game works out of the box on Proton with WineD3D (D3D8). I copied manually dxWrapper (d3d8d.dll + main folder, set in dxwrapper.ini D3d8to9 = 1), run protontricks GAMEID winecfg to set d3d8 to native, use start parameter PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command% and then the game worked on Vulkan with D9VK. Tested with the new ACO compiler on Plasma Wayland.
title: Sniper Art of Victory
